title: Changed Regex of keywords with more than 1
Made a root node to contain start and end tokens
Parse inf arity op and comparison op
Parse concat & fixed some error handling
Demarcation of statement types; parse variable change
Allows the tokens table to be populated
Changed the way to get keyword type
Evaluator is now used instead of lexer at the frontend
Proper fetching of variable value from symbol table & hotkeys
Added parsing for GIMMEH, changes to SMOOSH and VISIBLE
Added getStrChildren, an option to show the parse tree, fix for VISIBLE
added groundwork for flow control parsing
New SyntaxType and Node class for flowcontrol
improved consumeEOL() method and additional syntax check for loops
fixed program crashing when KTHXBYE is not present
implemented evaluate boolOp. New method typecastToken()
VISIBLE now prints the results of mathOp and boolOp
implemented special characters for yarn literals
VISIBLE now automatically adds \n unless it ends with !
Implicit Typecast from yarn -> troof is now allowed
Moved special yarn handling to Evaluator
linecounter now correctly reports the current line
eol before HAI is now matched with lazyMatch
implemented infarop, modified VISIBLE and SMOOSH
changed boolname to "isNested" modified printChildren() in NodeMultiline
SMOOSH (concat) can now be used as operand
Variable instantiation is no longer allowed within flow control.
Disallowed function ret outside of function
fix bug which causes the program to crash when no idToken is given
Replace most occurences of codeTextArea with codeArea
Fully removed codeTextArea in favor of codeArea
Fix and changes to lexer, parser, and evaluator
Updated CodeHighlighter to correctly color syntax
Changed datatypes for NUMBR and NUMBAR to long and double respectively
change highlight color and made <typeToken> grey in color
Fix some errors which causes program to crash.
Access to implicit variable IT is now allowed again (except loopid)
omitPreamble() is now used to allow comments before haiToken.
change css most css colors to names
change readme and add some samples
adjust tab size and add option to wrap text
Added some countermeasures for math operations that result on inf
Implemented soft-line breaks (... / ,) and refactored parsePrint()
add new samples and fix a small error on evaluator
Small fix on commas interfering with parsing of yarns
Add application icon and changed buttons to togglebuttons and text to label
add some improvements on side panel positioning depending on situation
